title: Craft the Totem of Undying
description: With this mod you can craft the Totem Of Undying
body:
With this mod you can finally craft the Totem Of Undying. 

***The mod is compatible with: [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)***  
For help with craft you can use: Easy Emerald

***RECIPE***  
![Example of recipe of Totem of Undying](https://i.imgur.com/mh0voIg.png)

![Partner link discount](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/112d23b8-9986-4823-80de-d312484cf8c8.webp)

***Feel free to use this mod on your modpack***
